0.text: Hypodense appearance in the right main bronchus and lower lobe bronchus at the base of the trachea

1.text: Free pleural effusion in both pleural spaces measuring up to 1.3 cm at its deepest point on the right

2.text: Increased density in the right lower lobe medial and lateral-posterobasal segments consistent with consolidation

3.text: 23x20 mm nodule with spiculated contours in the anterior segment of the left lower lobe

4.text: Nonspecific nodules in the lower lobe of the right lung, the largest measuring 6 mm

5.text: Cystic bronchiectasis in the bronchial structures of the right lower lobe
